cards.heading: AI-assisted planning
cards.body: Generate practical short-term task plans from your goals in seconds. Review suggestions before committing — nothing is created until you confirm.

cards.heading: Context-aware suggestions
cards.body: The AI planner reads your existing tasks before suggesting new ones, eliminating duplicates and incorporating context from other active goals.

cards.heading: Execution visibility
cards.body: Track completion progress, difficulty, and momentum across every goal from a single workflow.

cards.heading: Goal-based organisation
cards.body: Group tasks under goals and watch per-goal progress bars fill in real time. Clear AI-generated tasks for a goal with one click when priorities shift.

cards.heading: Story points & tiers
cards.body: Earn story points as you complete tasks. Difficulty multiplies your score. Climb from Poem to Epic as momentum builds across sessions.

cards.heading: Board and list views
cards.body: Switch between a drag-and-drop Kanban board and a filterable list view. Status changes sync instantly with no page reload needed.

cards.heading: Secure by design
cards.body: JWT-based sessions with short-lived tokens, per-endpoint rate limiting, and prompt guardrails on every AI request keep the platform reliable and abuse-resistant.

cards.heading: Multi-goal management
cards.body: Maintain multiple concurrent goals without losing track. Each goal has its own task set, progress bar, and AI context so nothing bleeds across projects.

cards.heading: Admin observability
cards.body: Role-gated admin dashboard surfaces request logs, unique active users, and task metrics so you can understand usage at a glance.
